pom.xml.general_idea: Update Maven compiler source and target properties to Java 17 to align with the JDK migration.
pom.xml.why_exists: Code compiled with Java 8 settings will not utilize Java 17 features and may fail if the project enforces a minimum Java 17 baseline or if newer libraries require Java 17 bytecode.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade JaCoCo plugin version to a snapshot compatible with Java 17.
pom.xml.why_exists: Older JaCoCo versions (like 0.7.8) do not support instrumenting Java 17 bytecode, leading to runtime errors or coverage failures.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Maven Compiler Plugin to a version that supports Java 17 compilation.
pom.xml.why_exists: Older compiler plugin versions (like 3.5.1) may not correctly handle Java 17 language features or module system requirements.

src/main/java/com/github/skjolber/mockit.general_idea: Replace String.format with String.formatted for modern string interpolation.
Replace manual cast after instanceof check with pattern matching variable declaration.

if(headers[i+1] instanceof String string) {
